description_long: This is a Yamaha monitor speaker with a rectangular, boxy form and a matte black finish. The front face features a large circular speaker grille, two round bass reflex ports above it, and a small tweeter at the top center. Below the grille, there are three rotary control knobs labeled for low, mid, and high frequencies, along with the Yamaha logo. The rear panel displays various input ports, a power socket, and product information labels, all set into a flat black metal surface. The sides and top are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design typical of professional audio equipment.
description: A matte black Yamaha monitor speaker with a prominent front grille, control knobs, and rear input ports, designed for professional audio use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the speaker grille, two bass reflex ports, a tweeter, three control knobs, and the Yamaha logo.
description_view_1: The left side view is plain, showing a smooth, unmarked black surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the input ports, power socket, and product information labels on a flat black panel.
description_view_3: The right side view is also plain, with a smooth, featureless black surface.
attribute_brand_logo: Yamaha logo in white, centered below the control knobs on the front panel.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Circular mesh grille with a concentric ring pattern, made of fine perforated metal.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three rotary knobs arranged horizontally below the speaker grille, each labeled for frequency adjustment (low, mid, high).
